mapper.select: SELECT id, project_id, goal, status, coordinator_id, implementer_id, task_id, current_step_id, started_at, completed_at, failure_reason FROM project_orchestration_sessions WHERE project_id = #{project_id} AND id = #{id}

SELECT id, project_id, goal, status, coordinator_id, implementer_id, task_id, current_step_id, started_at, completed_at, failure_reason FROM project_orchestration_sessions WHERE project_id = #{project_id} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{from}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project_orchestration_sessions( project_id, goal, status, coordinator_id, implementer_id, task_id, current_step_id, started_at, completed_at, failure_reason ) VALUES ( #{project_id}, #{description.goal}, #{description.status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description.coordinator, typeHandler=reengineering.ddd.mybatis.support.RefIntegerTypeHandler}, #{description.implementer, typeHandler=reengineering.ddd.mybatis.support.RefIntegerTypeHandler}, #{description.task, typeHandler=reengineering.ddd.mybatis.support.RefIntegerTypeHandler}, #{description.currentStep, typeHandler=reengineering.ddd.mybatis.support.RefIntegerTypeHandler}, #{description.startedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{description.completedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{description.failureReason} )
mapper.update: UPDATE project_orchestration_sessions SET status = #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, current_step_id = #{current_step, typeHandler=reengineering.ddd.mybatis.support.RefIntegerTypeHandler}, completed_at = #{completed_at, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, failure_reason = #{failure_reason}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE project_id = #{project_id} AND id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(id) FROM project_orchestration_sessions WHERE project_id = #{project_id}
